mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE mem_number = #{phoneNumber}
SELECT mem_id FROM member WHERE mem_number = #{phoneNumber}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE mem_number = #{phoneNumber} AND mem_pwd = #{password} AND role_id = '3'

SELECT feedback_id, member_id, phone_number, province_id, city_id, specific_address, aqi_level, air_quality_description, feedback_time, remarks FROM neps_feedback WHERE phone_number = #{phoneNumber} ORDER BY feedback_time DESC
